fields.name: Rlsd. Sales Orders Until Today
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of released sales orders that are displayed in the Warehouse Basic Cue on the Role Center. The documents are filtered by today's date.

fields.name: Posted Sales Shipments - Today
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of posted sales shipments that are displayed in the Basic Warehouse Cue on the Role Center. The documents are filtered by today's date.

fields.name: Exp. Purch. Orders Until Today
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of expected purchase orders that are displayed in the Basic Warehouse Cue on the Role Center. The documents are filtered by today's date.

fields.name: Posted Purch. Receipts - Today
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of posted purchase receipts that are displayed in the Warehouse Basic Cue on the Role Center. The documents are filtered by today's date.

fields.name: Invt. Picks Until Today
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of inventory picks that are displayed in the Warehouse Basic Cue on the Role Center. The documents are filtered by today's date.

fields.name: Invt. Put-aways Until Today
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of inventory put-always that are displayed in the Warehouse Basic Cue on the Role Center. The documents are filtered by today's date.

fields.name: Open Phys. Invt. Orders
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of open physical inventory orders.

fields.name: Date Filter
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the date interval that values are filtered by.
If this field contains starting and ending dates for a date interval, then other field values only show information for that interval.
You can enter a date interval according to the following rules.


Meaning


Sample expression


Entries that are included


Equal to

12 15 12

Only entries that are posted on December 15, 2012.


Interval

12 15 12..01 15 13
..12 15 12

Entries that are posted on dates between and including December 15, 2012, and January 15, 2013.
Entries that are posted on January 15, 2012, or earlier.


Either/or

12 15 12|12 16 12

Entries that are posted on either December 15, 2012, or December 16, 2012. If there are entries that are posted on both days, then all entries are displayed.


You can also combine the various format types.


Sample expression


Entries that are included


12 15 12|12 01 12..12 10 12

Entries that are posted either on December 15, 2012, or on dates between and including December 1, 2012, and December 10, 2012.


..12 14 12|12 30 12..

Entries that are posted on December 14, 2012, or earlier, or entries that are posted on December 30, 2012, or later, which includes all entries except those that are posted on dates between and including December 15, 2012, and December 29, 2012.

fields.name: Date Filter2
fields.tooltip: Specifies the second filter date for the documents that are displayed in the Warehouse Basic Cue on the Role Center.

fields.name: Location Filter
fields.tooltip: Specifies the location code for the documents that are displayed in the Warehouse Basic Cue on the Role Center. The documents are filtered by today's date.
